specs.name: Stellar Asset Contract (SAC) Interface
specs.description: Common interface implemented by every Stellar Asset Contract (SAC). SACs are the standard Soroban wrappers for Stellar classic assets and implement the full SEP-41 token interface plus SAC-specific admin operations.

specs.name: Native Asset Wrapper (XLM SAC)
specs.description: Stellar Asset Contract wrapping the native XLM asset. Exposes XLM as a SEP-41-compatible Soroban token.

specs.name: USD Coin (USDC)
specs.description: Circle's USD-backed stablecoin on Stellar mainnet, deployed as a Stellar Asset Contract (SAC).

specs.name: Euro Coin (EURC)
specs.description: Circle's EUR-backed stablecoin on Stellar mainnet, deployed as a Stellar Asset Contract (SAC). MiCA-compliant.

specs.name: Aquarius (AQUA)
specs.description: Governance and liquidity incentive token of the Aquarius protocol on Stellar mainnet.
